description_long: This is a beaded bracelet composed of large, round beads with a striking blue and white marbled pattern, strung together on a flexible cord. The beads are interspersed with smaller, flat disc spacers that appear to be a muted gray or white, adding subtle contrast to the vibrant blue. At each end of the bracelet, there are conical metallic or plastic end caps, from which several small looped cords or tassels extend, giving the piece a playful finish. The surface of the beads is glossy, reflecting light and enhancing the swirling color effect. The bracelet is designed to be worn around the wrist and is likely elastic or features a stretchable cord for easy wear. The overall style is bold and geometric, with a modern, abstract motif.
description: A bold blue and white marbled beaded bracelet with conical end caps and playful tassel details, featuring glossy round beads and subtle disc spacers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular arrangement of blue and white marbled beads, with both conical end caps and tassels clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the beads and the alternating pattern of round and disc-shaped elements.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the uniformity of the bead pattern and the symmetry of the bracelet's design.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view emphasizing the glossy finish of the beads and the detailed structure of the tassels at the end.
